Bramework

AI blog writing assistant with SEO keyword analysis

5/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$19/moStarting Price
2020Founded

About Bramework

Bramework is a ai writing platform founded in 2020. It positions itself as “AI blog writing assistant with SEO keyword analysis” and is best suited for blog posts, SEO writing, freelance writers, keyword analysis. Pricing starts at $19/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Long FormYes
Short FormYes
Seo ToolsYes
TemplatesYes
Tone ControlNo
Plagiarism CheckNo
MultilingualNo
Api AccessNo
Team CollaborationNo
Browser ExtensionNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Good keyword analysis built into the editor
  • Affordable for solo bloggers
  • Decent blog post generation quality

Cons

  • Limited features compared to bigger platforms
  • English only
  • No team collaboration features
